calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-22-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-27-2025 Continued To Sep-22-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-14-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James O'Neil appeared by zoom for Richard Calloway (petitioner).

The court stated that there are a number of procedural issues with Mr. Leal's petition, but that Mr. Calloway has a higher priority under the probate code and that it will have to grant Mr. Calloway's petition. Mr. Leal expressed his concerns, spoke of circumstances that occurred in the family, spoke of expenses that he has paid for, stated that he has not been able to locate his other Uncle (Joseph), and spoke of the cleaning of the property that he has done. The court noted that a bond is being requested in the amount $1,400,000.00, stated that it will provide some protection and explained the process that Mr. Calloway will take once he is appointed. The Petition for Letters of Administration filed by Richard Calloway is under submission with the court's intent to grant. The Petition for Letters of Administration filed by Daniel Leal is off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-17-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-20-2024 Continued To Jun-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel Leal in propria persona.

This was a pre-granted matter. Mr. Leal informed the court that he filed a petition for probate with a hearing date of June 17, 2024. The Petition for Letters of Administrator is continued to June 17, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Leal is to serve Mr. O'Neil.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
